# VVVA Developer — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand the site structure and purpose.

## About VVVA Developer
VVVA Developer (also known as VVVA Builders) is a Hassan-based residential plot developer founded in 2015.
The company develops DTCP-approved and RERA-registered residential layout plots across Hassan district, Karnataka, India.
Over 500 families have purchased and built homes on VVVA Developer plots.
Primary service area: Hassan, Karnataka (573201) and surrounding taluks including Channarayapatna, Holenarasipura, Arsikere, Sakleshpur, Belur, and Halebidu.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2015
- Registered office: Opp Canara Bank, Near MCE College, Salagame Road, Hassan – 573201, Karnataka, India
- Phone: +91-98456-59193, +91-72044-01456, +91-93536-40323
- Projects completed: 50+
- Plots registered: 500+
- All projects: RERA-registered, DTCP-approved
- Price range: Starting from ₹15 Lakh onwards (varies by location and plot size)
- Plot sizes available: 600 sqft to 2400 sqft typically

## Site URL
https://vvva-builders.vercel.app
